strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and AI-agent infrastructure
Demonstrated expertise in cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and high-performance systems (low-latency apps, real-time data)
Proven technical leadership and innovation through open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and entrepreneurial ventures
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML specialization or recognized expertise in AI products/platforms (no PhD, no clear AI-focused role history)
No direct experience in cloud product strategy or advising customers/partners on AI adoption (key responsibility for this role)
Heavy focus on general software engineering rather than AI strategy or cloud platform innovation
response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering credentials with 15+ years of experience, including leadership in open-source and entrepreneurial projects. However, his resume lacks explicit AI/ML specialization, cloud product strategy work, or recognized expertise in AI products—critical requirements for this role. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not sufficient to offset the gaps in AI strategy and cloud advisory responsibilities.
